mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO question_attempts ( attempted_on, correct, field_name, major_name, minor_name, source_label, source_url, import_batch_id ) VALUES
( #{item.attemptedOn}, #{item.correct}, #{item.fieldName}, #{item.majorName}, #{item.minorName}, #{item.sourceLabel}, #{item.sourceUrl}, #{item.importBatchId} )
mapper.select: SELECT import_batch_id, COUNT(*) AS total_count, MIN(attempted_on) AS min_attempted_on, MAX(attempted_on) AS max_attempted_on, MAX(created_at) AS latest_created_at FROM question_attempts GROUP BY import_batch_id ORDER BY latest_created_at DESC
